app.name: Cursus
app.tagline: The tech internship journey, structured and validated.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and receive a reset link.
auth.cguLabel: I accept the terms and conditions
auth.checkEmail: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a link within the next few minutes.
auth.checkEmailDescription: A confirmation email has been sent. Click the link to activate your account.
auth.checkEmailSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam or junk mail folder.
auth.resetTokenExpired: This reset link has expired or is invalid.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been updated. You will be redirected to the sign-in page.

errors.cguRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to create an account
errors.emailAlreadyUsed: This email is already associated with an account.
errors.emailAlreadyUsedDetail: This email is already associated with an account. Sign in or reset your password.
errors.generic: An error occurred, please try again later.

github.required: Connect your GitHub to submit your deliverables
github.handleAlreadyLinked: This GitHub account is already linked to another Cursus account
github.handleConflict: This GitHub account is already in use
github.oauthFailed: GitHub connection failed. Please try again.
github.notConnected: Not connected — required to submit deliverables

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.

fields.bioPlaceholder: In a few words, who are you?
fields.isPublicDescription: Make your profile visible in the public directory
fields.publicSlugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only.

avatar.label: Profile picture
avatar.uploadHint: PNG, JPG or WebP — 2 MB max

errors.invalidType: Unsupported format (PNG, JPG or WebP only)

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.description: This action will schedule the permanent deletion of your account in 30 days. You can cancel via the link sent by email.
delete.confirmDescription: To confirm, enter your email address and password.
delete.scheduledMessage: Your account will be deleted on {date}. Check your emails to cancel.

errors.emailMismatch: The email address does not match your account.
errors.generic: Error during deletion. Please try again.

errors.slugInvalidChars: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only

errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this resource.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.subtitle: Manage your personal data in accordance with GDPR (Articles 17 and 20).

export.title: Export my data
export.description: Download a copy of all your personal data stored by Cursus (profile, submissions, badges, notifications…). You will receive an email with a download link valid for 7 days.
export.cooldown: You already requested an export. Try again in {hours}h.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.description: Deletion is permanent and irreversible. Your personal data will be erased within 7 days of your request.

modal.title: Confirm deletion
modal.warning: This action is irreversible. Here is what will be deleted:

fields.title: Course title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the course in a few sentences…

errors.durationInvalid: Duration must be between 1 and 52 weeks
errors.slugInvalid: Identifier can only contain letters, digits and hyphens
errors.noModulesForPublish: Add at least one module before publishing
errors.deleteBlockedByCohortes: This course is used by {count} active cohort(s). Archive it instead.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this course
errors.cannotEditArchived: An archived course cannot be edited
errors.mustBeDraftToPublish: Only a draft can be published
errors.mustBePublishedToArchive: Only a published course can be archived

confirmDelete.title: Delete this course?
confirmDelete.description: This action is irreversible. All related data will be deleted.

preview.banner: Preview mode — you are not logged in as an intern
preview.submitDisabled: Action not available in preview mode
preview.noModules: This course has no modules yet.
preview.quizDisabled: Quiz not available in preview mode

cookieBanner.message: Cursus only uses cookies essential to the site's operation (session, preferences). No advertising tracking.
